commit.message:
feat(helloagents): Azure Queue Storage streams for cross-replica SSE

- Replace Orleans MemoryStreams with AddAzureQueueStreams (cross-silo)
- Aspire AppHost: Azurite emulator for local dev queue storage
- Bicep: Storage Account + Queue Data Contributor RBAC for managed identity
- K8s: HELLOAGENTS_STORAGE_QUEUE_ENDPOINT Flux var wired through
- Fix SSE JSON casing (PascalCase → camelCase) so frontend receives messages
- Persistent PubSubStore via Cosmos in production
- Falls back to MemoryStreams for InMemory/dev mode
- 2 new multi-tab Playwright tests (cross-tab message + discussion delivery)
- 22 backend tests + 21 E2E tests all passing

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Update about section text on homepage

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add scroll-margin-top for sticky header deep-link offset

section[id] and div[id] now receive scroll-margin-top: 4.5rem so that
hash-link navigation (#cv-packages, #why-nexus, #job-search etc.) scrolls
the target into view below the fixed site header rather than hiding it.

The smooth scroll behaviour was already declared in this file; this
completes it with the offset needed for sticky-nav pages.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add id=cv-packages to section element for stable deep link anchor

The cv-packages.html include now exposes id="cv-packages" directly on
the <section> element. Previously only the wrapper div in find-a-job
had this id; the inner section was anonymous, breaking deep links that
target the section's own boundary.

Anchor /job-seekers/find-a-job#cv-packages now scrolls to the section
with correct sticky-header offset applied by the scroll-margin-top rule
added in src_style.css.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: deep link anchors, scroll offset, and rebuild CSS

- Add id="cv-packages" to <section> in cv-packages.html so the include
  exposes a stable anchor matching the wrapper div in find-a-job/index.html;
  links of the form /job-seekers/find-a-job#cv-packages now resolve to the
  correct section element.
- Add scroll-margin-top (4.5 rem) for section[id] and div[id] in
  src_style.css so that deep-link navigation accounts for the sticky
  site header and does not obscure content behind the navbar.
- Rebuild nexus_web.css (Tailwind v4 production build) to pick up the
  new scroll-margin-top utility generated from src_style.css.

Branding (already committed on this branch):
  - desk_theme.css: full light/dark navbar, sidebar, dropdown, and
    awesomebar contrast rules; .navbar-home .app-logo sizing.
  - nexus_web.js: MutationObserver-based logo swap (LOGO_LIGHT/LOGO_DARK)
    keyed on data-theme attribute for correct contrast in both modes.
  - hooks.py: app_logo_url = /assets/nexus_web/logo.svg (correct).
  - logo-dark.svg: dark-mode variant asset added.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(auth): resolve token refresh short-circuit after 401

The double-check optimization in RefreshTokenAsync() prevented a real
refresh when the handler received a 401. After a proactive refresh in
GetTokenAsync() set the local expiry to +6h, the handler's subsequent
refresh call short-circuited because the local expiry looked valid —
even though the server had just rejected the token.

Changes:
- Add forceRefresh parameter to RefreshTokenAsync(); the handler uses
  it to bypass the double-check after a 401
- Parse the actual JWT exp claim instead of computing a client-side
  expiry with DateTime.UtcNow.AddHours(6), which could drift from the
  server's token lifetime
- Validate that the refresh endpoint returns a different token;
  if it returns the same expired token, treat it as a failure

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Limited sticky note modal content to 3 lines with ellipsis

Content Limitation Implementation:
- ADDED 3-line limit to modal content using -webkit-line-clamp
- APPLIED to all modal content types: homepage-modal-content and homepage-project-modal-content
- ADDED ellipsis (…) when content exceeds 3 lines
- WORKS on both mobile and desktop devices

Technical Implementation:
- Used display: -webkit-box for line clamping support
- Set -webkit-line-clamp: 3 for exactly 3 lines
- Added -webkit-box-orient: vertical for proper orientation
- Set overflow: hidden to hide excess content
- Added text-overflow: ellipsis for visual truncation indicator

User Experience:
- Content previews limited to 3 lines in sticky note modals
- Clear ellipsis (…) indicates there's more content available
- Encourages users to click 'View Full Post/Project' buttons
- Maintains clean, consistent modal appearance
- Prevents overwhelming users with too much text in previews

Behavior:
- Short content: displays normally without ellipsis
- Long content: truncates at 3 lines with ellipsis
- Users must click 'View Full' button to see complete content
- Consistent across all sticky note modals

Perfect content teasing to drive engagement with full posts/projects!

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
修复: ASS 解析失败返回空串、补 JSON 条目/字节上限防 OOM

- ParseAssDialogue: commas<9 时改返回空串而非原始乱码内容，避免把格式错误的行显示给用户
- ExecuteExtractSubAsync: 新增 MAX_SUBTITLE_ENTRIES=50000 和 MAX_JSON_BYTES=16MB 上限，超出时记录 WARN 日志并提前 break，防止超大字幕文件耗尽内存

commit.message:
修复: 过滤图像字幕轨道、修正 HTML 标签检测范围及补 session guard

- SubtitleBridgeAdapter: 构建内嵌字幕轨道列表前过滤 hdmv_pgs/dvd_subtitle/dvb_subtitle 等图像型 codec，避免不可渲染的轨道出现在选择器中
- SubtitleBridgeAdapter: stripSubtitleMarkup 中 '<' 检测改为只在 <字母 或 </ 时进入 HTML 模式，避免误吞 '1 < 2' 等普通比较符号
- VideoPlayerController: IJK 内嵌字幕回调补 session guard（currentSessionId + subtitleAdapter 双重检查），防止旧实例 onTimedText 延迟触发污染当前控制器状态

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

修复: 补 streamIndex 范围校验、av_packet_alloc 空指针守卫、av_read_frame 错误区分及 NAPI deferred 检查

- 补 <climits>/<ThrowRangeError 前置声明>
- ExtractSubtitleEntries: streamIndex int64→int 前加范围校验
- av_packet_alloc 返回 nullptr 时清理资源并 reject
- av_read_frame 区分 AVERROR_EOF（正常）与其他负值（错误）
- CompleteExtractSubAsync: 所有 napi_* 调用加返回值检查，兜底确保 Promise 被 settle
- README: 修正量词「一遥控器」→「仅用遥控器」

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

New flash fix approach - hide all circular elements during transition

🔄 Circle Flash Fix (Targeted Approach):
- Hide all potentially problematic circular elements during page transitions
- Target: theme toggle, filter dots, navigation logos, search/filter containers
- Use visibility: hidden instead of complex animation disabling
- Restore visibility after transition completes
- Focused approach based on identifying circular CSS elements (border-radius: 50%)
- Should eliminate PC-specific rendering artifacts without affecting performance

Elements hidden during transition:
- .filter-dot (6px circles in blog filters)
- .nav-logo, .nav-logo-large (circular navigation logos)
- .search-container, .filter-container (search/filter UI)
- #theme-toggle (theme switcher button)

commit.message:
优化: 字幕默认选择改为优先内嵌字幕，再回退外置字幕

原逻辑：优先外置字幕（外置 → 内嵌兜底 index=0）
新逻辑：优先第一条内嵌字幕 → 无内嵌时选第一条外置字幕 → 都无则不显示

findPreferredTrackIndex() 在基类 SubtitleBridgeAdapterBase，
AVPlayer 和 ijkplayer 路径均继承该方法，一次修改两路同时生效。

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

优化: 内嵌字幕轨道去掉"内嵌字幕 N"前缀，直接显示语言描述信息

外部字幕已有 [外部·SRT] 标识，内嵌字幕去掉冗余前缀后可展示更多有效信息。
- IjkSubtitleBridgeAdapter：直接使用 buildSubtitleTrackDisplayName() 返回值
  如 "中文 (ASS) 简体"、"英语 (SRT)"
- AvSubtitleBridgeAdapter：直接使用语言名称，无语言时退回 "字幕 N"

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

修复: 内嵌字幕轨道列表显示恢复简体/繁体标注

IjkSubtitleBridgeAdapter.loadInternalTracks() 改用
FfprobeUtil.buildSubtitleTrackDisplayName()，
该方法通过 FfprobeTrack.title 调用 getSubtitleTier3Label() 区分简体/繁体。
示例："内嵌字幕 1 (中文 (ASS) 简体)" 而非仅显示 "内嵌字幕 1 (中文)"

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
修复: 内嵌字幕 ASS 解析 — 检测 Dialogue 冒号格式，跳 9 逗号提取 Text 字段

根因：rect->ass 是含乱码'Dialogue'单词的完整行格式：
  <garbled>: Layer,Start,End,Style,Name,0,0,0,Effect,Text
上一版本检测第一字段是否为数字，无法匹配此格式，导致原始 ASS 元数据字符串透传显示。

修复逻辑（parseAssIfNeeded）：
1. 优先查找 ': '（冒号+空格）→ 跳过 9 个逗号到 Text 字段
2. 回退：第一字段为纯数字（MKV 包格式）→ 跳 8 个逗号
3. 无法识别结构（清除信号/垃圾包）→ 返回空字符串清除字幕

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
